title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: The concert was cancelled because the singer was ill.
example.secondSentence: The concert was (1) _________ because the singer was ill.

questions.firstSentence: Someone had left the back door unlocked.
She is not as confident as she looks.
He was too frightened to enter the dark room.
questions.secondSentence: He wasn't (1) _________ to enter the dark room.

questions.firstSentence: She regrets not taking the opportunity.
He was in the habit of going to the market on Saturdays.
She said to him, 'Please don't tell anyone.'
